name: R.C. Sproul
title: Theologian & Pastor
bio: American Reformed theologian, pastor, and founder of Ligonier Ministries. He authored over 100 books and was known for making complex theology accessible to ordinary Christians. He served as co-pastor at Saint Andrew's Chapel in Sanford, Florida.
faith: Sproul dedicated his life to teaching the holiness of God and Reformed theology. His book 'The Holiness of God' is considered a modern classic. He was instrumental in drafting the Chicago Statement on Biblical Inerrancy (1978).

videos.title: R.C. Sproul — Ligonier Teaching Series
videos.note: Sproul's extensive teaching library is available through Ligonier

sources.title: The Holiness of God
sources.note: By R.C. Sproul. His most influential work on God's transcendent holiness

tagline: Made the holiness of God accessible to a generation of believers
